# phare_users (Data Source)

Fetches a list of users, optionally filtered by email addresses.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `emails` (List of String) List of email addresses to filter users. If not specified, returns all users (first page, up to 100 users).

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) List of users (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `email` (String) User email address
- `id` (Number) User ID
- `role` (String) User role (member or admin)
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp
